summary: Testing after P0 bug fixes (email URLs, YASH logos) and P1 refactoring (OverallSummary.js, GanttCard.js, EstimatorDialogs.js extracted). All features working correctly.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (-1 width/height) - cosmetic only, charts render correctly
React hydration warnings about <span> inside <tr>/<tbody> - cosmetic, does not affect functionality

context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 bug fixes and P1 refactoring completed successfully. All extracted components (OverallSummary.js, GanttCard.js, EstimatorDialogs.js) working correctly. Email URLs now use /estimator?edit= pattern. YASH logo visible on Milestones and Cashflow pages.
